ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Jackett/Jackett
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett
Language: c%23
API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
Language: c%23
Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NickvisionApps/Parabolic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NickvisionApps/Parabolic
Language: c%23
Download web video and audio

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Pik-4/HsMod
Language: c%23
Hearthstone Modification Based on BepInEx

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seralyth/Seralyth-Menu

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SmartlyDressedGames/U3-SDK
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mono/SkiaSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp
Language: c%23
SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.
